description: Read the wireframe HTML in full before writing any code
acceptance_criteria: The file wireframes/ui-modernisation.html has been read completely
All 14 screen tabs have been reviewed
Design tokens, typography, and layout details are understood

description: Set up design tokens and typography (Poppins + DM Mono fonts)
acceptance_criteria: All CSS custom properties from the plan are defined (--pink, --sidebar, --bg, --radius, --shadow-sm, --shadow-md, etc.)
Poppins (weights 300, 400, 500, 600, 700) loaded from Google Fonts in _document.tsx
DM Mono (weights 400, 500) loaded from Google Fonts in _document.tsx
Fonts applied globally in theme.ts or global CSS

description: Implement shell layout and collapsible sidebar (Screen 1 – Navigation)
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar is 240px wide, collapses to 60px via CSS class .col with transition: width .22s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)
Sidebar background is #1e2128, right border is #2a2d35
Sidebar header: logo (left-aligned) + collapse toggle button (right)
Nav sections have uppercase labels (DATA, SCHEMA, ADMIN)
Active nav item has 5px pink left border and rgba(236,72,153,.1) background
Nav items are 32px height with icon + label
In collapsed state, labels and section headings are hidden, icons remain at 60px
Sidebar footer: avatar + username + role, collapses to avatar only
Main area has 64px topbar (white, bottom border) with page title left + actions right
Content area has #eef0f3 background, 28px padding, overflow-y: auto
Nav icons use SVG stroke style at 17x17px

description: Implement homepage with hero banner and action cards (Screen 2 – Homepage)
acceptance_criteria: Hero banner has #1e2128 background, full width
Hero left: eyebrow text (DATA PLATFORM), title (Welcome to rAPId), subtitle
Hero right: 3 stats (Datasets, Schemas, Subjects) with DM Mono font for numbers
Pink radial gradient overlay on the right side of the hero
Body is a two-column grid: main 1fr + right panel 260px, 28px padding
Three action cards (Data=pink left border, Schema=green left border, Admin=purple left border)
Admin card has an Admin Only badge (purple)
Cards have staggered fade-in animation (0.04s, 0.10s, 0.16s delay)
Right panel shows recent activity list and quick stats widget

description: Implement catalog page with filterable dataset table (Screen 3 – Catalog)
acceptance_criteria: Topbar shows Data Catalog title and Upload Dataset primary button
Table is wrapped in a white card (border-radius: 8px, border, shadow)
Toolbar has search input with magnifier icon (pink focus ring)
Filter chips: All, Raw, Curated — active chip has pink border and faint pink background
Right side of toolbar has rows-per-page select and category dropdown
thead has #fafafa background, 10px uppercase headers with sort indicators
tbody rows have hover state #fafafa and 11px row border
Columns: Dataset Name (monospace), Domain, Layer (badge), Owner, Last Updated, Size, Actions
Action buttons per row: Download and Delete (small outline buttons, delete is red)
Layer badges: Raw=blue, Curated=purple
Pagination: info text (left) + page buttons (right), active page = pink filled

description: Implement upload data form (Screen 4 – Upload Data)
acceptance_criteria: Form is max-width 640px centred in the content area
Three numbered cards stacked vertically
Card 1 has pink numbered circle badge (1), dataset selector dropdown (full width, 36px height), and Create new dataset link
Card 2 has drag-and-drop zone with dashed border, upload icon in pink circle, Drop file here or browse text, and CSV/Parquet hint
Drag-and-drop zone shows pink border and pink faint background on hover
Progress bar is pink, 4px height, shown during upload
Card 3 has checkboxes for upload options (overwrite, validate schema, etc.) matching wireframe labels
Form actions bar has Upload primary button, Cancel secondary button, and status chip showing selected dataset
Card layout similar to Upload Data
Card 1: Select Dataset — selected dataset shown as pink info chip once chosen
Card 2: Query builder with date range, filters, row limit fields (36px height inputs, pink focus)
Card 3: Output format selector (CSV / Parquet toggle chips)
Form actions have Download primary button and query result info chip showing row count
Same card/table pattern as Catalog
Columns: Job ID (monospace), Type, Dataset, Status (badge), Started, Duration, Actions
Status badges: Running=blue, Complete=green, Failed=red, Queued=amber
Row click navigates to Job Detail page

description: Implement job detail page (Screen 7 – Job Detail)
acceptance_criteria: Two-section layout: status card and log card
Status card shows job metadata in a grid (ID, type, dataset, started, duration, status badge)
Log card has monospace log output in a #1e2128 dark box with scrollable content using DM Mono font
Topbar actions: Re-run button (secondary) and Delete button (red outline)

description: Implement delete data form (Screen 8 – Delete Data)
acceptance_criteria: Single card layout
Dataset selector present
Confirmation input requiring the user to type the dataset name
Red Delete button
Warning info box with red faint background matching wireframe style

description: Implement create schema form (Screen 9 – Create Schema)
acceptance_criteria: Multi-card form with cards for: Dataset Details, Schema Fields, Metadata
Schema Fields card has dynamic add/remove rows for column name, type, nullable
Field rows match wireframe style (uppercase label, 36px input, hint text below)

description: Implement subject management pages (Screens 10–12 – Create/Modify/Delete Subject)
acceptance_criteria: Create Subject page: name input + permissions checkboxes + datasets selector
Modify Subject page: subject selector + permissions editor (same as create)
Delete Subject page: subject selector + confirmation
All three pages use the same card form pattern

description: Implement user admin table (Screen 13 – User Admin)
acceptance_criteria: Table of subjects using the same card/table pattern as Catalog
Columns: Subject Name (monospace), Type, Permissions count, Created, Actions (Edit, Delete)

description: Implement data admin table (Screen 14 – Data Admin)
acceptance_criteria: Admin-only dataset table using the same table pattern
Additional columns compared to Catalog: owner, sensitivity level, raw/curated toggle
Admin badge shown in topbar

description: Update shared component library to new design tokens
acceptance_criteria: Button component: primary (pink, border-radius: 5px), secondary (white/border), destructive (red border on hover)
Badge/Chip component matches status badge styles from wireframe
Table abstracted into a reusable card+table component if not already
Input/Select: 36px height, pink focus ring, border-radius: 5px
Card component: border-radius: 8px, border: 1px solid #e5e7eb, box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm)

description: All tests pass after UI changes
acceptance_criteria: cd frontend && npm test exits with code 0
Any test failures caused only by structural/class name changes (not business logic) have been fixed
No business-logic test assertions have been altered
cd frontend && npm run lint exits with code 0
No ESLint errors remain

description: Pull request raised against feature/ui_modernisation (not main)
acceptance_criteria: A PR is open with base branch feature/ui_modernisation
PR title and description summarise the UI modernisation changes
PR is not merged by the agent
